divergences.decision: PRD/System scope and supported consumption channels: openYuanrong DataSystem exposes object, KV, stream, and heterogeneous NPU cache semantics, consumed through C++/Python/Java/Go SDKs plus dscli/dsbench; arc42 building blocks are common, client, worker, master, server, protos, and language bindings.
divergences.detail: The PR introduces a standalone Notify CLI/domain under src/notify with send/send_all notification behavior, plus specs/plans/docs for that unrelated API. This is not one of the in-scope DataSystem interface families or supported SDK/CLI channels in the mental model, and it does not integrate with the documented client/worker/master/common architecture.
divergences.evidence: src/notify/notifier.py:new file; docs/notify.md:new file; specs/demo-notify.md:new file; plans/demo-notify.md:new file
divergences.fix: Remove the unrelated Notify CLI/demo files from this repository, or update and ratify the mental model to include this new product scope and its architecture/build/test conventions before merging.
